user.title: Connect to SAJ Elekeeper Smart Plug
user.description: Select the portal region used for this account and enter its credentials.

data_description.region: Choose the region of the Elekeeper web portal where the account was created.

plant.title: Select plant
plant.description: Your account has more than one plant.

reauth_confirm.title: Reconnect to SAJ Elekeeper Smart Plug

error.invalid_auth: The username or email address, or the password, was rejected.
error.no_plants: No plant is available to this Elekeeper account.

init.title: Smart Plug update interval
init.description: Smart Plug data is polled; this API does not provide push updates.
